name: DragonRise PC TWIN SHOCK Gamepad
notes: 101-byte descriptor. Reconstructed from Linux kernel hid-dr.c comments for PID 0x0011 original (same structure applies to 0x0006). THE most common cheap USB gamepad chipset -- millions in circulation under dozens of brand names (Tesun USB-703, NGS Phantom, Trust GXT 24, Defender Cobra R4, etc). Known issue: multiple hardware revisions share the same VID:PID but have different axis mappings. The descriptor duplicates Usage(X) four times (a known firmware bug). wDescriptorLength=101.
